inputs.name: accessibleDescription
inputs.description: Defines the accessible description of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleDescriptionRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that describe the select.

inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that label the select.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component is in disabled state.

*Note:** A disabled component is noninteractive.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
Determines the name by which the component will be identified upon submission in an HTML form.

*Note:** This property is only applicable within the context of an HTML Form element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component is read-only.

*Note:** A read-only component is not editable,
but still provides visual feedback upon user interaction.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Defines whether the component is required.

inputs.name: textSeparator
inputs.description: Defines the separator type for the two columns layout when Select is in read-only mode.

inputs.name: tooltip
inputs.description: Defines the tooltip of the select.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Defines the value of the component:

- when get - returns the value of the component or the value/text content of the selected option.
- when set - selects the option with matching `value` property or text content.

*Note:** Use either the Select's value or the Options' selected property.
Mixed usage could result in unexpected behavior.

*Note:** If the given value does not match any existing option,
no option will be selected and the Select component will be displayed as empty.

inputs.name: valueState
inputs.description: Defines the value state of the component.

outputs.name: ui5Change
outputs.description: Fired when the selected option changes.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired after the component's dropdown menu closes.

outputs.name: ui5LiveChange
outputs.description:
Fired when the user navigates through the options, but the selection is not finalized,
or when pressing the ESC key to revert the current selection.

outputs.name: ui5Open
outputs.description: Fired after the component's dropdown menu opens.
